# QINLONG&CHENJIE

> Independent experimental animation studio by Qinlong (animator) and Chenjie (video essay). Selected works 2019–2025 across animation, video essays, drawings, and photography.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Studio introduction and featured works.
- [Works](/work): Selected animation and video essay projects, 2019–2025.
- [Drawing](/drawing): Drawing collections.
- [Photographs](/photographs): Photographic series.
- [Texts](/texts): Long-form essays and writing.
- [News](/news): Studio updates, screenings, and exhibitions.
- [Artists](/artists): About Qinlong and Chenjie.
- [Contact](/contact): Get in touch.

## Selected Projects

- [DUST](/work/beyond-orbit): Video essay.
- [Between Us and the World](/work/between-us): Video essay.
- [IN-BETWEEN](/work/tiny-worlds): Animation.
- [GAFA Animation Major](/work/gafa-logo): Commercial.
- [Entering the Cloud](/work/entering-cloud): Commercial, naked-eye 3D.
- [Naturally Yours](/work/resonance): Animation.
- [YEAR OF FATE](/work/fizzy-pop): Animation.
- [INTROSPECTION](/work/shadows-within): Animation.
- [Life's TRACk](/work/dreamscape): Animation.
